title: Such, Such Is Death by Charles Sorley — Sad Poetry Lines
content:
Such, such is Death: no triumph: no defeat:
Only an empty pail, a slate rubbed clean,
A merciful putting away of what has been.

And this we know: Dea

title: A Letter From the Trenches to a School Friend by Charles Sorley — Sad Poetry Lines
content:
I have not brought my Odyssey
With me here across the sea;
But you'll remember, when I say
How, when they went down Sparta way,
To sandy Sparta, long
